name: restaurant owners processing 20–50 sales transactions/month tool
description: For restaurant owners processing 20–50 sales transactions/month, inconsistent sales data causes payroll delays. We automate payroll and tax document generation instead of manual data entry into payroll systems.
problem_solved: Inaccurate payroll and tax documents due to manual data entry from sales.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inaccurate payroll and tax documents due to manual data entry from sales.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For restaurant owners processing 20–50 sales transactions/month, inconsistent sales data causes payroll delays. We automate payroll and tax document generation instead of manual data entry into payroll systems.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual data entry into payroll systems

one_liner: For restaurant owners processing 20–50 sales transactions/month, inconsistent sales data causes payroll delays. We automate payroll and tax document generation instead of manual data entry into payroll systems.
